Check D589 snapshot+tail equivalence for a committed prefix and tail.

## Import

```ts
import { agenticMemoryCommittedFactSnapshotTailEquivalent } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function agenticMemoryCommittedFactSnapshotTailEquivalent(
	prefix: readonly AgenticMemoryCommittedFact<TJson>[],
	tail: readonly AgenticMemoryCommittedFact<TJson>[],
): boolean
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `prefix` | `readonly AgenticMemoryCommittedFact<TJson>[]` | Committed prefix facts. |
| `tail` | `readonly AgenticMemoryCommittedFact<TJson>[]` | Committed tail facts. |

## Returns

Whether snapshot+tail materializes identically to prefix plus tail facts.
